title: Pseudoternary Phase Diagram Construction
author: Siriporn Okonogi
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jyccpsw

steps.title: Prepare surfactant systems (Smix) by mixing...
steps.instruction: Prepare surfactant systems (Smix) by mixing surfactant (Tween 20, Tween 80, or Triton X-100) and cosurfactant (absolute ethanol, propylene glycol, or isopropanol) at weight ratios (surfactant:cosurfactant) of 1:2, 1:1, and 2:1.

steps.title: Mix Alpinia galangal oil (AGO) and...
steps.instruction: Mix Alpinia galangal oil (AGO) and Smix at weight ratios (AGO:Smix) of 0:1, 1:9, 2:8, 3:7, 4:6, 5:5, 6:4, 7:3, 8:2, 9:1 and 1:0.

steps.title: Titrate the mixtures (resulted from step...
steps.instruction: Titrate the mixtures (resulted from step 2) with distilled water until the mixtures reached equilibrium that the mixtures show an end point of clarity. The volume of the water used was recorded. The composition of each component at the equilibrium point was determined and calculated into a weight percent.

steps.title: The pseudoternary phase diagrams were constructed...
steps.instruction: The pseudoternary phase diagrams were constructed using OriginPro8 for Windows (OriginLab Corporation, USA) by adding the weight percent of Smix, AGO, and water in each equilibrium end point obtained from step 3.
